kba_problem_summary: Hotfix bundle for DeltaV v15.FP3 addressing multiple issues in controllers, I/O cards and workstations, including a documented PRODUCT SAFETY CONCERN on PK controller PROFNET communications that may cause unannounced frozen process values and potential process trips.
severity_justification: Includes explicit PRODUCT SAFETY CONCERN, controller communication loss, node switchovers, and unannounced value freezing that can affect production and safety-related loops at levels 0-1.
occurrence_justification: Issues occur under specific conditions (PROFNET traffic, socket errors, downloads, redundant configurations) and have been observed in multiple customer incidents, not universal but plausible.
detectability_justification: Several problems are silent or lack proper alarming (frozen values without BAD status, communication loss without node switchover, unannounced errors), making early detection difficult without diagnostics.

modifiers_applied.reason: Hotfix bundles provided for General Maintenance and Targeted Distribution
Direct impact on controllers, CHARMs, EIOC and PK controllers
PROFNET safety concern and references to SLS/SIS hotfixes

affected_products: DeltaV Controller (MQ, MX, SQ, SX, SZ, PK)
workaround_description: Nessun workaround documentato; installazione dei bundle hotfix è la soluzione indicata.
divergence_explanation: Emerson classifica come 'Product Issues' con azione al prossimo service interval, ma la presenza di un PRODUCT SAFETY CONCERN e problemi ai livelli 0-1 giustifica un livello Warning invece di Advisory puro.
red_flags: PRODUCT SAFETY CONCERN on PROFNET communications
Process value freezing without alarm or bad status
Controller communication loss without node switchover
notes: KBA distribuisce bundle hotfix sia in General Maintenance che Targeted Distribution. Alcuni issue rimandano a KB separate (es. NK-2500-0642, NK-2600-0082). Installazione raccomandata, con priorità maggiore per clienti con PK controller e PROFNET.
